error.capacity_details: mukufuna %d bits, mphamvu yayikulu pa k=1 ndi %d bits
error.empty_coefficients: chidutswa cha coefficient sichingakhale chopanda kanthu
error.insufficient_capacity: Uthenga waukulu kwambiri kuti ukhale ndi mphamvu yokwanira yokwanira
error.insufficient_coefficients: ma coefficient osakwanira panthawi yoyika: akufunika %d, apeza %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: ma coefficient osakwanira ogwiritsira ntchito mutu: akufunika ma bits 32, apeza ma coefficients ogwiritsidwa ntchito %d okha
error.invalid_code_word: mawu a khodi sangakhale opanda kanthu
error.invalid_coefficient_range: mtengo wa coefficient wapita pamlingo wovomerezeka (-2048 mpaka 2047)
error.invalid_k_parameter: gawo la k liyenera kukhala pakati pa 1 ndi 8
error.matrix_encode_failed: Kulemba matrix kwalephera pa mawu a code: %v
error.message_too_large: Kukula kwa uthenga kupitirira malire ololedwa (mabaiti 8,388,607)
error.nil_random_source: gwero lachisawawa silingakhale lopanda pake: gwiritsani ntchito InitializePRNG(password) kapena perekani RandomSource yomwe yabzalidwa kale

log.k_selected: Gawo labwino kwambiri la k lasankhidwa
